name: /pr-corpus-learn missing impact preview source blocks promotion with a specific actionable error
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '[{"id":"p1","verbatim_quote":"x","usefulness_estimate":4,"supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":1},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":1}]}]\n' > pr-corpus/patterns.json && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-learn.sh" --patterns pr-corpus/patterns.json --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --root /nonexistent/path 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'impact_preview_failed' err.txt && grep -q 'root=/nonexistent/path' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
